content.en:
Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect.

This is the most powerful Holy Sect of the three Holy Sects of the Holy Realm, Heaven and Earth, with five Supreme Holy Beasts, one of which has reached the second level of the Supreme Holy Beast, and there are more other Holy Beasts below the Supreme Holy Beast, and the number is more than several times that of the Haitian Holy Sect.

Moreover, the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect occupies the most resourceful area of the Holy Realm.

Right now, the powerhouses of the Exotic Heaven and Earth have not yet conquered the area of the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect, this is a tacit understanding, and it can be regarded as a kind of cooperation, which will only destroy the territory of those small forces first.

It can be said that in the early or middle stages of the Great Tribulation, the three major holy sects were almost not in any danger.

At this time, although the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect was preparing for battle, the overall appearance was still peaceful.

this day.

When the Violent Ape Holy Beast came to the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect, it was immediately sensed by the strongest Holy Beasts of the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect.

"Storm Ape, what are you doing here?"

Voices enveloped the Tyrannical Ape Sacred Beast.

The Violent Ape Holy Beast immediately requested: "Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast, the door of our Haitian Holy Sect was occupied by a supreme ancestor of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the other party came in through the door, and cooperated with the Heyuan Holy Beast of our sect to kill the wolf bone holy beast, and now the Haitian Holy Sect has fallen into his hands." That Ancestor has reached the second level of the Supreme Ancestor, and while the other party has not completely established his foundation, I also asked the Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast to help me drive away the other party, otherwise the other party will establish a forbidden land in our Sacred Domain Heaven and Earth, and our Sacred Domain Heaven and Earth will be in trouble!"

Wow!

One figure after another appeared, all of them were huge foreign beasts, they were the strongest holy beasts of the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect.

One of them had six eyes, covered in black scales.

It is the Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast.

"Storm Ape, you are really useless, even the door has been snatched away, but now we can't help you, the second level of the Supreme Ancestor plus a Supreme Holy Beast, such a power is very strong, if we start a war with the other party, what if a foreign powerhouse invades our Ten Thousand Beast Holy Sect? We can't take risks for your Sea and Sky Holy Sect. After the catastrophe, the other party must leave, and we will help you kill the Heyuan Holy Beast and recapture the Haitian Holy Sect. "

The Ten Thousand Sacred Beast proposed.

"Okay!"

The Tyrannical Ape Sacred Beast reluctantly agreed.

If it weren't for the help of the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect, he wouldn't be able to kill the Heyuan Holy Beast by himself.

In the following days, the Tyrannical Ape Holy Beast stayed in the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect.

......

After Ye Tian occupied the Haitian Forbidden Land, he sent a large number of Terrans to transform the Haitian Forbidden Land, and even the ancestors of the Terran were sent to guard the Haitian Forbidden Land.

And one of Ye Tian's incarnations also stayed outside the vicinity of the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land, if there was a top ancestor in the Dark Forbidden Land to invade the Sea and Sky Forbidden Land, he would naturally be able to make a move as soon as possible.

Subsequently, one of the Terran ancestors often came and went out of the gate and brought back a large amount of resources from the Haitian Holy Sect.

The amount of resources possessed by the entire Haitian Holy Sect was unimaginable to the human race.

The Terrans have only existed for a few dark durations, but the Haitian Holy Sect has existed for several catastrophe times, and has also invaded the Dark Forbidden Domain, and even the resources in the treasure house are astronomical.

Moreover, the territory of the Haitian Holy Sect is very large, and many resource treasures have now been mined in large quantities by Ye Tian's people, and all of them have been transported back to the human race.

After all, once the Great Tribulation was in the late stage, the Haitian Holy Sect might not be able to keep it, so he naturally had to bring the resources back to the Terran Race.

At the same time, many of the holy methods and other secret techniques possessed by the Haitian Holy Sect were also brought back to the human race, almost turning the Haitian Holy Sect into an empty shell.

The Great Tribulation is short-lived, lasting a total of one realm year.

In the first hundred billion years, foreign forces would not invade the three major holy sects, so Ye Tian is now taking this opportunity to seize the resources of other forces, of course, he is as a foreign powerhouse.

As a result, Ye Tian's copy body personally took action, crossed a piece of territory, seized the resources of many forces, and once someone resisted, he would be killed directly.

Countless resources, countless classics, all fell into Ye Tian's hands.

During this period, he also encountered some foreign powerhouses, and everyone understood each other very tacitly, and did not fight, after all, now is not the time to fight.

The entire Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth was in a state of wailing, allowing Ye Tian to see the horror of the Great Tribulation.

This is only the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth has many supreme holy beasts, and it can also keep a lot of territory, if it is the Dark Forbidden Domain, the past is even more terrifying, and everything will be wiped out directly.

Year after year passed, and in the later stage, basically the larger forces were wiped out, and the resources of the Holy Realm began to become less.

But even so, Ye Tian didn't waste resources, even if the resources were useless to him, he collected them all, at least they could be used to cultivate the strong of the human race.

Gradually, hundreds of billions of years passed.

Hundreds of billions of years is indeed not a long time, but this is already in the middle of the great tribulation.

At this time, it is very likely that the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth will give birth to the Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal.

As for where the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal will be born, it's really hard to say, it depends on luck.

The Origin Rule Robbery Crystal will be born in a short period of time, and the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth are too big, so even if the cultivation is weak, it is very likely that they will obtain the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, and the powerful Supreme Saint Beast level powerhouse will most likely not be able to obtain a single Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

Of course, once you get the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal, unless no one sees it, once the news is leaked, you will still be hunted down by a large number of strong people, and it will be difficult to keep the Origin Rule Robbery Crystal without enough strength.

this day.

A piece of news came that a top holy beast cultivator in the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth had obtained an Origin Rule Tribulation Crystal, and it was now being tracked.

-------------------

A silent and bloody void.

A top-notch sacred beast resembling a minotaur is hiding inside a small world, gathering all its breath and diving beneath the rocky earth of the small world.

In normal times, it would be difficult to find out if it was hidden.

However, now it is a catastrophe.

Rumble!!!!

An exotic powerhouse comparable to the strongest holy beast came here, saw this lonely small world group, and with a wave of his hand, countless small worlds were shattered, this piece of time and space was also shattered, and many hidden spaces were also reduced to nothing.

The countless creatures inside it were naturally annihilated.

Under such an attack, the top holy beast could not hide and was exposed.

"Hahaha, I didn't expect you to hide here, you can't escape!"

The exotic powerhouse said excitedly.

Click!!!

The top-notch holy beast was severely injured by the opponent's blow, and the innate holy objects on its body were directly shattered.

After the second blow, the top holy beast was killed.

Just as he was about to collect the corpse of this top-notch holy beast, another exotic powerhouse appeared.

Suddenly, a great war broke out between the powerhouses of the foreign land.
